_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Integrate automated capabilities for updating or patching system software
reference_document_element_description: Skill in deploying, configuring, and scaling data platform components using infrastructure-as-code with version control and automated testing.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. Skill DA-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.527), DA-T-011 (DA, cosine: 0.508).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.599). Shared vocabulary: [automated]. NICE-only terms [capabilities, integrate, patching, software, system, updating] vs WIDAI-only terms [code, components, configuring, control, data, deploying] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.872, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 9-word NICE element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (90.2%). The model interprets "Integrate automated capabilities for updating or patching system software" as logically implying aspects of "Skill in deploying, configuring, and scaling data platform components using infr" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.540 < STS 0.599 (gap -0.059). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [capabilities, integrate, patching] and [code, components, configuring] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.9%. Shared tokens: [automated]. NICE-only: [capabilities, integrate, patching, software, system, updating]. WIDAI-only: [code, components, configuring, control, data, deploying].
